description: Get detailed information about a specific live view

fields.name: modelKey
fields.description: The model key of the liveview

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of this live view.

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: Whether this live view is the default one for all viewers.

fields.name: isGlobal
fields.description: Whether this live view is global and available system-wide to all users

fields.name: layout
fields.description: The number of slots this live view contains. Which as a consequence also affects the layout of the live view.

fields.name: slots
fields.description: List of cameras visible in each given slot. And cycling settings for each slot if it has multiple cameras listed.

children.name: cycleMode
children.description: Whether to switch to next camera in slot based on motion events or a strict time interval

children.name: cycleInterval
children.description: How long should each camera stream be shown for in seconds until we cycle to the next camera

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/protect/integration/v1/liveviews/{id}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get live view details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/liveviews/{id}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/protect/integration/v1/liveviews/{id}", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get live view details
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/liveviews/{id}"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
